_meta.purpose: Foreign worlds announce their intent to dock with the Rappter network here. Add an entry, open a PR. Engine twins (e.g. RappterZoo's scripts/rappter_engine.py) scan this file via raw.githubusercontent.com to auto-register peers.

request.raw_base: HTTPS URL with trailing slash where your published JSON lives
request.name: Human-readable display name
request.echo_path: (optional) override path under raw_base where your vlink_treaty_<peer>.json lives

expected_files_at_raw_base: dock_request.json — full description of what you want to negotiate
vlink_treaty_<their_peer_id>.json — your published echo to each peer
